CHALLENGE TO VENUE FILED FILED BY DEFENDANT O'BRIEN, MATT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-09-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-09-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF STEVEN MAYER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MATT O'BRIEN IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-09-2021 - VENUE CHALLENGE IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION TO NOV-09-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF STEVEN MAYER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MATT O'BRIAN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MAYER, STEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT O'BRIEN, MATT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-09-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REMARK: RETURN MAIL-SC-100 SENT TO MATT O'BRIEN CERTIFIED MAIL-UNCLAIMED/RETURN TO SENDER.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $85.00) SERVED AUG-06-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT O'BRIEN, MATT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAYER, STEVEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT O'BRIEN, MATT COURT DOES NOT HAVE VENUE OVER THE CLAIM/CAUSE OF ACTION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
